one_professor_lesson: 从教授视角看，这篇文章教学生如何为特定垂直领域（如工程设计）设计严谨的多智能体基准，尤其要注意分离检索贡献和测试条件分支。工程实践中，学生应学习如何将仿真工具、知识库和作业调度集成进智能体系统，并理解端到端测评比单一指标更有说服力。文中监督式架构是务实起点，但注意其局限（如单点故障），未来可探索更去中心化的设计。
one_good_idea_to_steal: 三维基准分别考察工具使用、知识检索和长时间任务执行，维度互补
one_bad_idea_or_risk: 仅用两个领域问题，基准泛化能力不足，难以直接迁移至其他工程细分
one_transferable_pattern: 构建多维度基准的模块化设计：将任务分解为不同认知维度，独立评测
one_future_work_application: 在开发AI工程助手时，可借鉴其三维测评思路，从工具调用、知识检索、长任务执行三方面制定验收标准
one_architecture_takeaway: 多智能体系统采用监督式架构，基于状态图（LangGraph）编排工具调用、检索和仿真节点；评测设计将任务按认知需求分类，并引入门控评分隔离组件贡献，此模式可直接应用于企业级AI工程平台设计。
one_interview_talking_point: 在面试中可举例说明多智能体系统如何协调工程仿真、检索和作业调度，展示端到端交付能力
one_project_idea: 基于LangGraph构建一个简化的工程设计智能体，集成一个开源仿真工具（如FreeFEM）和文档检索，复现基础流程

agent_flow.responsibility: 从 HF Daily、Papers with Code、arXiv、OpenReview、ACL、CVF 和公司研究页发现候选论文。
保留 sourceUrl、paperUrl、abstract、sourceSignals、focusTopics 和版本号，避免只看标题判断。
按岗位相关性、架构价值、实用性、新颖性、评估质量、面试表达和可构建性打分。
只对 1-2 篇高价值论文做教授式深读，讲清好设计、坏设计和可迁移模式。
用 validate 脚本检查 trace、daily 输出、review 字段和中文编码。
agent_flow.signal: npm run validate is the quality gate

agent_flow.responsibility: 把 daily radar 摘要发布到 public/data/paper-radar.json，供前端展示。
保存 candidates、triage、reviewed 和 daily 文件，后续复用思路架构。

checks.label: daily output has one must-read paper
daily output keeps at most three skim papers
triage top list stays small and present
daily output includes professor learning fields
at least one Pro review is attached or cached

reflection.summary: Reflection found 1 watch item(s); keep the feed small and evidence-led.
whatWorked: Must-read selected with score 97: Auditing Agent Harness Safety
4 selected paper(s) carried agent harness / observability signals.
2 reviewed paper file(s) are available for teaching-oriented reuse.
whatToWatch: 114 papers were below top cutoff; inspect if emerging concepts are being crowded out.
selfCorrections: Do not treat fresh or hot as sufficient quality evidence; freshness only earns attention, not promotion.
Benchmark and evaluation papers must be read through claims, controlled variables, metrics, and failure modes.
A paper is only Articles-worthy when it teaches a reusable AI engineer pattern, not merely because it is about AI.
nextRunAdjustments: Keep AHE rescue enabled, but prefer papers with concrete harness/eval evidence.
Use reviewed papers as candidates for full Articles deep dive only after manual read.
If a review lacks good/bad/transferable patterns, rerun review with stricter professor prompt instead of publishing a shallow analysis.
